title: Communauté de communes de la Région de Frévent
summary: The Communauté de communes de la Région de Frévent was located in the Pas-de-Calais département, in northern France. It was created in January 1999. It was merged into the new Communauté de communes du Ternois in January 2017.
text:
The Communauté de communes de la Région de Frévent was located in the Pas-de-Calais département, in northern France. It was created in January 1999. It was merged into the new Communauté de communes du Ternois in January 2017.

Composition
It comprised the following 12 communes:
